content:
FINAL OWNER ACCEPTANCE TASK — IVX COMPLETE

This is the final task before IVX IA is considered complete as Senior Developer.

OBJECTIVE

Do not claim VERIFIED until every item below has been executed against the live production system with real evidence.

EXECUTE

1. Verify GitHub HEAD equals production commit.
2. Verify latest Render deployment is healthy.
3. Verify /health returns HTTP 200.
4. Verify /version matches GitHub HEAD.
5. Verify all owner routes are registered.
6. Verify Owner Login works.
7. Verify IVX IA Chat works.
8. Verify AI generates a real reply.
9. Verify chat persists after refresh.
10. Verify chat persists after app restart.
11. Verify Members module displays live data.
12. Verify Landing page loads correctly.
13. Verify Deals module.
14. Verify Admin Dashboard.
15. Verify Android app.
16. Verify iOS app.
17. Verify browser QA automation can capture screenshots.
18. Verify no placeholder or mock data is shown.
19. Verify all production secrets required by the application are successfully loaded at runtime. If any are missing, identify the exact variable name and provide runtime evidence.
20. Verify there are no remaining production blockers.

RETURN ONLY

TASK_ID:
STATE:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
HEALTH_STATUS:
VERSION_STATUS:
OWNER_LOGIN_STATUS:
CHAT_STATUS:
AI_REPLY_STATUS:
CHAT_PERSISTENCE_STATUS:
MEMBERS_STATUS:
LANDING_STATUS:
DEALS_STATUS:
ADMIN_STATUS:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
QA_AUTOMATION_STATUS:
SECRETS_STATUS:
BLOCKERS:
FILES_CHANGED:
TESTS_RUN:
LIVE_EVIDENCE:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULES

• No assumptions.
• No placeholder evidence.
• No generic narrative.
• Every VERIFIED item must be backed by live production evidence.
• If any item cannot be proven, mark that item FAILED or UNVERIFIED and explain the exact reason.
• Only return FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED when every required production check has passed.
